Thanks for dropping by! It looks like this is about the **conductor.build AI coding assistant** rather than [Conductor OSS](https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor) — the workflow orchestration engine. They share a name but are separate products.

For conductor.build issues, head to [conductor.build/docs](https://www.conductor.build/docs) — their Discord community and support email are listed there.

Closing this as out-of-scope for this repo. Hope you get it sorted!
